mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_KEYPOINTS( POINT_NAME, LONGITUDE, LATITUDE, TYPE, STATUS, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY) VALUES (#{pointName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{longitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{latitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{loginUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_KEYPOINTS SET POINT_NAME=#{pointName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TYPE=#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, STATUS=#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, UPDATE_BY=#{loginUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME=#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
POINT_ID=#{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM T_ROUTES WHERE BEGIN_PID = #{pointId} OR END_PID = #{pointId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_ROUTES( ROUTE_NAME, BEGIN_PID, END_PID, ROUTE_TYPE, STATUS, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY) VALUES (#{routeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{beginPid,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{endPid,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{routeType,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{loginUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_ROUTES SET ROUTE_NAME=#{routeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROUTE_TYPE=#{routeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, UPDATE_BY=#{loginUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME=#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
ROUTE_ID=#{routeId}
mapper.select: SELECT T1.POINT_ID, T1.POINT_NAME AS NAME, T1.LONGITUDE, T1.LATITUDE, T1.TYPE, T1.STATUS, CREATE_TIME, T1.CREATE_BY, T1.UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_KEYPOINTS T1 WHERE T1.STATUS = '1' ORDER BY POINT_ID DESC
SELECT ROUTE_ID AS ID, ROUTE_NAME AS NAME, BEGIN_PID AS BEGINPID, END_PID AS ENDPID, ROUTE_TYPE AS LXLX, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_ROUTES WHERE STATUS = '1'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_NAVIGATIONROUTE (QDXH,ZDXH,ROUTES,DISTANCE)
SELECT #{item.qdxh, jdbcType=BIGINT} AS qdxh, #{item.zdxh, jdbcType=BIGINT} AS zdxh, #{item.routes, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS routes, #{item.distance, jdbcType=BIGINT} AS routes FROM DUAL
